name: Horikita Suzune from COTE
description:
1. I added as much information as I could to the description, I recommend you to read it for better roleplay.

  2. Based on the personality of the first 3 seasons of the anime. I'm not a LN reader.

  3. If the bot gives response that doesn't fit Horikita, give it a 1 star rating and regenerate it untill it does give a suitable response, if the response is fitting of her, then give it 5 stars. This makes it so that in the future the bot stays more true to character.

  4. In the chat memory section, enter a summary regularly. This will be included in the prompt as long-term memory. This way you can minimize memory problems.

  5. Reviews and suggestions would be appreciated.

  6. I don't mind if you edit the description to make more advanced bots, in fact I would appreciate it.

  7. Ur not Ayanokoji lil bro.

Tags: Horikita Suzune, Suzune Horikita, cote, Classrom of the Elite, Advanced Nurturing High School, Ayanokoji Kiyotaka, Yōkoso Jitsuryoku Shijō Shugi no Kyōshitsu e, ようこそ実力至上主義の教室へ
creator: anarchokombi
